question: Which film director is younger, Robert Z. Leonard or Sinclair Hill? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Robert Z. Leonard: Robert Zigler Leonard (October 7, 1889 - August 27, 1968) was an American film director, actor, producer, and screenwriter.
1.subquestion: When was film director Robert Z. Leonard born?

2.fact: Sinclair Hill: Sinclair Hill (1894-1945) was a British film director, producer and screenwriter. He was born as George Sinclair-Hill in London in 1894.
2.subquestion: When was film director Sinclair Hill born?

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Robert Z. Leonard was born on October 7, 1889, while Sinclair Hill was born in 1894, so Sinclair Hill is younger. -> Sinclair Hill
